case_title: LAUREN ELIZABETH WEBER VS. KA YU WONG et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEBER, LAUREN ELIZABETH AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, KA YU WONG, WAI YING FUNG DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-17-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-21-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-02-2011

REMOVED FROM THE PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR OCT-04-2011 - CASE DID NOT SETTLE.
